mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id, p.name, p.price, p.stock, p.status, p.create_time, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
